description_long: This object is a collection of various urban traffic signs, each mounted on slender metallic poles. The set includes circular regulatory signs with red borders, blue mandatory direction signs, parking signs, and a large overhead signpost with multiple attached signs. Two convex safety mirrors are also present, typically used at intersections for visibility. The signs display a range of symbols, numbers, and arrows, with some featuring text such as 'P' for parking. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the poles and frames, with reflective coated surfaces for the sign faces and mirrors.
description: A grouped set of urban traffic signs and mirrors mounted on metal poles, featuring regulatory, directional, and parking signs with reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, including speed limits, direction arrows, parking, and two convex mirrors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the sign faces and the depth of the overhead signpost and mirrors.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement and spacing of the signs, with the overhead post and mirrors clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the backs of the signs and the mounting hardware on the poles.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: arrows, speed limit numbers, parking symbol, pedestrian symbol, convex mirror
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, parking lot entrance
